text: A dry-run install plan is generated before any runtime write.
evidence_required: install plan JSON with mode=dry_run and no_runtime_roots_modified=true

text: Apply mode is used only after explicit approval.
evidence_required: task log or command record showing explicit approval and install_skill.py --apply

text: Post-install validation and hash comparison are recorded.
evidence_required: quick_validate output, lint output, and source/destination SKILL.md sha256 values

text: Rollback evidence is available for changed runtime roots.
evidence_required: installer backup_path or new-install removal instruction
